have h : (fun n : ℕ => n - n) = (fun n : ℕ => 0) := by
    funext n
    simp [Nat.sub_self]
  have h₁ : P (fun n => n - n) := by assumption
  have h₂ : P (fun n => 0) := by
    rw [h] at h₁
    exact h₁
  exact h₂

have h₁ : (fun n : ℕ => n - n) = (fun n : ℕ => 0) := by
    funext n
    have h₂ : n - n = 0 := by
      rw [Nat.sub_self]
    simp [h₂]
  rw [h₁]
  <;>
  aesop

have h : (fun n : ℕ => n - n) = (fun n : ℕ => 0) := by

  rw [← h]

  rw [h]

have h : (fun n : ℕ => 0 : ℕ → ℕ) = (fun n : ℕ => 0 : ℕ → ℕ) := rfl
  -- Use the reflexivity of equality to conclude the proof
  have h₂ : P (fun n => 0) := by
    trivial
  exact h₂
